betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Industrial Liquification Machine§f melts solid materials into liquid form.

§eFunction:§f
• Melts ingots and materials
• Creates molten metal for processing
• Opposite of Solidification Machine

§eApplications:§f
• Preparing materials for casting
• Alloy creation
• Advanced metalworking

§aTip:§f Use for creating molten metal flows in production lines.
